title: bolboschoenus maritimus subsp. macrostachys
intro: Bolboschoenus maritimus subsp. macrostachys, also known as tall spike-rush, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The tall spike-rush is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and soothing respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Bolboschoenus maritimus subsp. macrostachys is often used in decoctions or infusions, where it is typically combined with other herbs to create remedies for colds and other illnesses.
